risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI & Autonomous Technologies Production Monitoring, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Continuous Monitoring
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of enterprise-wide monitoring controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Continuous Monitoring (MON-01) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Production Monitoring (AAT-16) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to regularly review processes and documented procedures to ensure conformity with the organization's security, compliance and/or resilience policies, standards and other applicable requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments (CPL-03) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Production Monitoring (AAT-16) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
